title: agave schottii
intro: Agave schottii, also known as the Shreve's agave, is a species of succulent plant in the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, Agave schottii has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and wounds. Agave schottii can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
